allow: Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync} = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\('./data/app.db'\); const pres = db.prepare\('SELECT id, title, created_at, LENGTH\(slides\) as slides_len FROM presentations ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 10'\).all\(\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(pres, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync} = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\('./data/app.db'\); const slides = db.prepare\('SELECT slides FROM presentations WHERE id=?'\).get\('5794eb93-7b8e-4e28-a9ce-50fd4eb84a7e'\); const parsed = JSON.parse\(slides.slides\); console.log\('Slides count:', parsed.length\); console.log\('First slide elements:', JSON.stringify\(parsed[0], null, 2\).substring\(0, 1000\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const {DatabaseSync} = require\('node:sqlite'\); const db = new DatabaseSync\('./data/app.db'\); const slides = db.prepare\('SELECT slides FROM presentations WHERE id=?'\).get\('a354a9bc-4830-4288-bba9-42b0e9779a9c'\); console.log\(slides.slides\);")
